programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In order to connect with each other and share a few laughs, the women of Gokuldham colony organise and attend a kitty party.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to hurry up home after Babita prepares a Bengali cuisine for him. Later, he gets angry when Champaklal interrupts his and Babita's conversation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal gets upset after Goli eats the entire dish prepared by Babita; Jethalal discusses the declining sales with Nattu Kaka and Bagha.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha and Nattu Kakka offer free pani puri on purchases from Gada Electronics; the society's sweeper demands a higher salary.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal, although hesitant, agrees with Bagha and Nattu Kakka's plan to increase sales. On the other hand, people hear about the offer and get excited.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The society members prepare themselves to celebrate and welcome Ganesh Chaturthi.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is confident that the panipuri scheme will be successful; Jethalal informs Bapuji that Nattu Kaka and Bagga had planned a surprise for him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gada Electronics makes amazing profits due to the free unlimited pani puri scheme. However, when the vendor has to go away because of some emergency, Jethalal finds himself in trouble.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Jethalal has no option, he disguises himself as the pani puri vendor and starts selling it himself. He later feels embarrassed when people start recognising him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Jethalal is making and selling the pani puris himself, Iyer and Babita pass by and see him. He gets embarrassed and tries to hide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Jethalal is selling pani puris, the police come and arrest him for putting a stall without permission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone from the society goes to the police station to bail Jethalal after he is arrested for selling pani puris without permission.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Jethalal is arrested, everyone from the society tries to bail him out. Chalu Pandey reluctantly listens to Jethalal's side of the story and later realises that he is innocent.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Police discover 'gold woman' Durga Sawant's body in a jungle. Later, investigation reveals she had recently separated from her husband.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A man is shocked to see his friend's dead body replaced by another man's body. Soon, he calls upon the CID team for help, but he himself becomes the culprit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When the men of Gokuldham are forced to write poetry for their wives, they ask Taarak for help. However, Taarak refuses to help them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As per their wives' request, the men of Gokuldham society try their best to write poetry for them. Later, Popatlal brags about his poetry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak decides to teach the men of Gokuldham society about writing poetry. Later, the ladies decide to organise a competition.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham society think they cannot complete writing the poetry before the competition. Later, the winter party begins.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The winter party celebration begins with the men narrating their poetry. Later, Dr Hathi's poetry impresses everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Despite Jethalal's wish, Iyer successfully presents his poetry for Babita and impresses everyone. Later, Popatlal takes the stage.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Ganesh Acharya comes to Gokuldham society to promote his film 'Hey Bro'. Daya notices the similarities between Dr Haathi and Ganesh Acharya and tells everyone they are related.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Lord Vishnu stops Poorna from mentioning his truth in front of Yashoda. Meanwhile, Lord Shani decides to meet Neel Mani at Gokul.

programme.desc: Mithun Chakraborty shakes a leg with Shilpa Shetty on 'I Am A Disco Dancer' and entertains the audience. Later, Aadhyayasree manages to impress the judges with a dazzling performance.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chalu Pandey suggests a tricky bargain in exchange for locating Popatlal. Bhide becomes torn about his decision.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal and his friends participate in a race to test their fitness. He wins the race and Jethalal feels happy. Later, Champaklal encounters a spoilt brat and decides to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.desc: Inspector Pandey discovers Popatlal in hiding and orders everyone to back off, believing this will be the first criminal he's managed to catch in Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is relieved when Bhide's uncle asks Inspector Pandey to let Popatlal go. He goes on to make an announcement concerning Popatlal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal gives Vidya and her fiancé blessings although he still feels sad inside. Inspector Pandey arrests Bhide because his report against Popatlal turns out to be false.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide gets very upset when Tapu and friends break the rearview mirror of his scooter. He angrily approaches Jethalal's house and demands that he fix the mirror.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On the first day of the year, Tapu organises a cleanliness drive in Gokuldham; a mysterious car splashes mud on Champaklal's clothes, angering him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and his friends accidentally break the rear-view mirror of Bhide's scooter. Later, Bhide comes to Jethalal's house to demand he fixes the mirror.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita tries to stop the fight between Jethalal and Bhide. Later, Tapu Sena confess to Jethalal that they have broken the rear-view mirror of Bhide's scooter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A boy suddenly appears in front of Bhide as he rides his scooter, making Bhide swerve off the road and injure himself.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide witnesses two thieves stealing his scooter and records them on a video. Later, he finds his scooter tied to a crane.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide asks Don Baadal to return his scooter and Don Baadal asks for money in exchange. However, the number shocks Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Don Baadal gives Bhide two days to collect one crore rupees he requests in exchange for the scooter. Soon, Bhide and his family come together to find the money.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya informs Jethalal about the incident with Bhide's scooter and Don Baadal. However, Bhide mistakenly assumes that Jethalal is helping him with the money.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide's neighbours brainstorm about a plan to get his scooter back from Don Baadal. Later, Popatlal informs Toofan about the incident.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Toofan arrives at Gokuldham and Bhide asks him to help retreive his scooter from Don Baadal. Soon, Toofan has a talk with Don Baadal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is shocked seeing Toofan bow in front of Don Baadal as it is revealed that Don Baadal is his mentor. Later, Sodhi promises he will get Bhide's scooter back in twelve hours.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal suggests they try to drug Don Baadal by giving him a kulfi. Soon, Bhide's neighbours get on with the plan.

programme.desc: Daya and the neighbours prepare the kulfi for Don Baadal. Later, Jethalal and his friends disguise themselves as kulfi sellers and visit Don Baadal's bungalow.

programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.desc: After successfully drugging Don Baadal and his henchmen with the kulfi, Jethalal and Popatlal drive Bhide's scooter back to Gokuldham society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After finding out that Bhide and his neighbours have stolen his car, Don Baadal and his goons give Gokuldham society a visit.
